title: Scoped validation: jit validate --scope
description:
Add `jit validate --scope <id>` that evaluates rules over a container bracket subtree with a deterministic exit code, for use as a gate checker.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] The scope slice is the container transitive dependency closure including the breakdown node, and excludes whole-repo rules.
- [ ] Each in-slice issue is evaluated against the rules whose selector matches it; a rule selecting the breakdown node fires.
- [ ] Exits 4 (ValidationFailed) with findings shown when an enforcing rule fails; zero when clean.
